name: dj-music
description: DJ techno music library management — 20 MCP dispatchers (6 entity CRUD + 3 provider + 2 compute + sync + 2 admin + 6 UI Prefab Apps) + 27 resources + 6 prompts + 6 handlers. FastMCP v3 bounded-contexts architecture.

args: cd "${DJ_PLUGIN_DEV_PATH:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}}" && set -a && if [ -f .env ]; then source .env; fi && set +a && exec uv run fastmcp run fastmcp.json --no-banner

cd "${DJ_PLUGIN_DEV_PATH:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}}" && set -a && source .env 2>/dev/null && set +a && SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN="${DJ_DB_ACCESS_TOKEN:?DJ_DB_ACCESS_TOKEN not set in .env}" exec npx -y @supabase/mcp-server-supabase@0.7.0 --read-only --project-ref="${DJ_DB_PROJECT_REF:?DJ_DB_PROJECT_REF not set in .env}" --features=database,docs,debug
